sq_nonneg: LEMMA FORALL (x: real): sq(x) >= 0
sq_zero: LEMMA FORALL (x: real): sq(x) = 0 IFF x = 0
abs_nonneg: LEMMA FORALL (x: real): abs(x) >= 0
abs_zero: LEMMA FORALL (x: real): abs(x) = 0 IFF x = 0
triangle_inequality: LEMMA FORALL (x, y: real): abs(x + y) <= abs(x) + abs(y)
abs_mult: LEMMA FORALL (x, y: real): abs(x * y) = abs(x) * abs(y)
cauchy_schwarz_1d: LEMMA FORALL (x, y: real): sq(x * y) <= sq(x) * sq(y)
mean_inequality: LEMMA FORALL (x, y: real): x >= 0 AND y >= 0 IMPLIES sq((x + y) / 2) >= x * y
sqrt_sq: LEMMA FORALL (x: nonneg_real): sqrt(sq(x)) = x
sq_sqrt: LEMMA FORALL (x: nonneg_real): sq(sqrt(x)) = x
sqrt_mult: LEMMA FORALL (x, y: nonneg_real): sqrt(x * y) = sqrt(x) * sqrt(y)
continuous_sum: LEMMA FORALL (f, g: [real -> real], a: real): continuous?(f, a) AND continuous?(g, a) IMPLIES continuous?(f + g, a)
continuous_product: LEMMA FORALL (f, g: [real -> real], a: real): continuous?(f, a) AND continuous?(g, a) IMPLIES continuous?(f * g, a)
ivt: LEMMA FORALL (f: [real -> real], a, b: real): a < b AND continuous_on?(f, closed_interval(a, b)) AND f(a) * f(b) < 0 IMPLIES EXISTS (c: real): a < c AND c < b AND f(c) = 0
div_mod_identity: LEMMA FORALL (a: int, b: posnat): a = b * div(a, b) + mod(a, b)
mod_bounds: LEMMA FORALL (a: int, b: posnat): 0 <= mod(a, b) AND mod(a, b) < b
gcd_comm: LEMMA FORALL (a, b: nat): gcd(a, b) = gcd(b, a)
gcd_assoc: LEMMA FORALL (a, b, c: nat): gcd(gcd(a, b), c) = gcd(a, gcd(b, c))
bezout: LEMMA FORALL (a, b: nat): EXISTS (x, y: int): gcd(a, b) = a * x + b * y
coprime_mult: LEMMA FORALL (a, b, c: nat): gcd(a, b) = 1 AND divides(a, b * c) IMPLIES divides(a, c)
prime_divides_product: LEMMA FORALL (p: posnat, a, b: nat): prime?(p) AND divides(p, a * b) IMPLIES divides(p, a) OR divides(p, b)
infinitely_many_primes: LEMMA FORALL (n: nat): EXISTS (p: nat): p > n AND prime?(p)
fermat_little: LEMMA FORALL (a: int, p: posnat): prime?(p) AND NOT divides(p, a) IMPLIES mod(expt(a, p - 1), p) = 1
convergent_sum: LEMMA FORALL (s1, s2: sequence[real], L1, L2: real): convergent?(s1, L1) AND convergent?(s2, L2) IMPLIES convergent?(s1 + s2, L1 + L2)
convergent_product: LEMMA FORALL (s: sequence[real], L: real, c: real): convergent?(s, L) IMPLIES convergent?(c * s, c * L)
convergent_bounded: LEMMA FORALL (s: sequence[real], L: real): convergent?(s, L) IMPLIES bounded?(s)
squeeze_theorem: LEMMA FORALL (f, g, h: sequence[real], L: real): convergent?(f, L) AND convergent?(h, L) AND (FORALL (n: nat): f(n) <= g(n) AND g(n) <= h(n)) IMPLIES convergent?(g, L)
monotone_convergence: LEMMA FORALL (s: sequence[real]): monotone_increasing?(s) AND bounded_above?(s) IMPLIES convergent?(s)
cauchy_convergent: LEMMA FORALL (s: sequence[real]): cauchy?(s) IFF convergent?(s)
geometric_series: LEMMA FORALL (r: real): abs(r) < 1 IMPLIES convergent?(geometric(r), 1 / (1 - r))
harmonic_diverges: LEMMA NOT convergent?(harmonic)
length_append: LEMMA FORALL (l1, l2: list[T]): length(append(l1, l2)) = length(l1) + length(l2)
append_nil: LEMMA FORALL (l: list[T]): append(l, null) = l
append_assoc: LEMMA FORALL (l1, l2, l3: list[T]): append(append(l1, l2), l3) = append(l1, append(l2, l3))
reverse_reverse: LEMMA FORALL (l: list[T]): reverse(reverse(l)) = l
length_reverse: LEMMA FORALL (l: list[T]): length(reverse(l)) = length(l)
member_append: LEMMA FORALL (x: T, l1, l2: list[T]): member(x, append(l1, l2)) IFF member(x, l1) OR member(x, l2)
nth_map: LEMMA FORALL (f: [T -> S], l: list[T], i: below[length(l)]): nth(map(f, l), i) = f(nth(l, i))
length_map: LEMMA FORALL (f: [T -> S], l: list[T]): length(map(f, l)) = length(l)
filter_append: LEMMA FORALL (P: pred[T], l1, l2: list[T]): filter(P, append(l1, l2)) = append(filter(P, l1), filter(P, l2))
sorted_append: LEMMA FORALL (l1, l2: list[real]): sorted?(l1) AND sorted?(l2) AND (FORALL (x: (l1), y: (l2)): x <= y) IMPLIES sorted?(append(l1, l2))
float_add_comm: LEMMA FORALL (x, y: double): finite?(x) AND finite?(y) AND finite?(fadd(x, y)) IMPLIES fadd(x, y) = fadd(y, x)
float_error_bound: LEMMA FORALL (x, y: double): finite?(x) AND finite?(y) AND finite?(fadd(x, y)) IMPLIES abs(fadd(x, y) - (FtoR(x) + FtoR(y))) <= ulp(fadd(x, y)) / 2
float_mult_error: LEMMA FORALL (x, y: double): finite?(x) AND finite?(y) AND finite?(fmul(x, y)) IMPLIES abs(fmul(x, y) - FtoR(x) * FtoR(y)) <= ulp(fmul(x, y)) / 2
sterbenz_lemma: LEMMA FORALL (x, y: double): finite?(x) AND finite?(y) AND y / 2 <= x AND x <= 2 * y IMPLIES finite?(fsub(x, y)) AND fsub(x, y) = FtoR(x) - FtoR(y)
float_sqrt_correct: LEMMA FORALL (x: double): finite?(x) AND FtoR(x) >= 0 IMPLIES abs(fsqrt(x) - sqrt(FtoR(x))) <= ulp(fsqrt(x)) / 2
walk_length: LEMMA FORALL (G: graph[T], w: Walk(G)): length(edges(w)) = length(vertices(w)) - 1
path_is_walk: LEMMA FORALL (G: graph[T], p: Path(G)): walk?(G, p)
connected_symmetric: LEMMA FORALL (G: graph[T], u, v: (vert(G))): connected?(G, u, v) IMPLIES connected?(G, v, u)
tree_edges: LEMMA FORALL (G: graph[T]): tree?(G) IMPLIES card(edges(G)) = card(vert(G)) - 1
euler_formula: LEMMA FORALL (G: graph[T]): connected?(G) AND planar?(G) IMPLIES card(vert(G)) - card(edges(G)) + card(faces(G)) = 2
